title: May 9th, 2026
sentiment: We keep adding until we can't find it anymore, then call it progress.

stories.title: Internet Archive Switzerland
stories.summary: A Swiss chapter of the Internet Archive extending a global mission to preserve knowledge — because what we don't deliberately keep, we accidentally lose.

stories.title: Bun's experimental Rust rewrite hits 99.8% test compatibility on Linux x64 glibc
stories.summary: Rewriting a runtime in Rust to meet it where it already lives — evolution through patience rather than replacement.

stories.title: I've banned query strings
stories.summary: Taking something away because it cost more than it gave — a small act of restraint that says something large about how we build.
